title: betula alba var. intermedia
intro: Betula alba var. intermedia, also known as Silver Birch or White Birch, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. The bark of Betula alba var. intermedia is rich in salicylic acid, which is responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. This tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Betula alba var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although caution should be exercised due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
